title: palicourea ctenocalyx
intro: Palicourea ctenocalyx is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Palicourea ctenocalyx include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
